creator: uzimac@da3m0n8t3r.com
text:
(Aug  9 09:08 py27-opengl-3.0.1_1.tbz)

# pkg_add py27-opengl-3.0.1_1.tbz 
pkg_add: could not find package gcc-4.6.3 !



(I believe gcc4.6.4 is an update, but for some reason the file times for 4.6.3 and 4.6.4 don't seem to add up.)

Jun  8 00:37 gcc-4.6.3.tbz
Jun  7 03:32 gcc-4.6.4.20120511.tbz
Jun 14 06:42 gcc-4.6.4.20120608.tbz

Thank you

Fix: 

update port, make package
How-To-Repeat: # pkg_add py27-opengl-3.0.1_1.tbz
